title: Employs Magnetism
summary: You command metal and the power of magnetism.
tiers: Tier 3: Destroy Metal or Guide Bolt
gm_intrusions: The metal twists, bends, or produces shrapnel. A lapse in concentration might cause something to slip or drop at just the wrong time.
text: You command metal and the power of magnetism.
details: You command metal and the power of magnetism.
